property.name: requestorType
property.formula: (select rt.Name from ROI_RequestorType rt where rt.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = ROI_RequestorType_Seq)

property.name: epn
property.formula: (select TOP 1 rr.value from ROI_RequestorRestriction rr where rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.SystemColumn = 'EPN' and rr.value is not null)

property.name: ssn
property.formula: (select TOP 1 rr.value from ROI_RequestorRestriction rr where rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.SystemColumn = 'SSN' and rr.value is not null)

property.name: dateOfBirth
property.formula: (select TOP 1 rr.value from ROI_RequestorRestriction rr where rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.SystemColumn = 'DOB' and rr.value is not null)

property.name: facility
property.formula: (select TOP 1 rr.value from ROI_RequestorRestriction rr where rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.SystemColumn = 'FACILITY' and rr.value is not null)

property.name: freeFormFacilityExists
property.formula: (select TOP 1 rr.value from ROI_RequestorRestriction rr where rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.SystemColumn = 'FREEFORM_FACILITY' and rr.value is not null)

property.name: mrn
property.formula: (select TOP 1 rr.value from ROI_RequestorRestriction rr where rr.ROI_Requestor_Seq = ROI_Requestor_Seq and rr.SystemColumn = 'MRN' and rr.value is not null)

property.name: salesTax
property.formula: (select rt.SalesTaxEnable from ROI_RequestorType rt where rt.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = ROI_RequestorType_Seq)

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT count(r.ROI_RequestCoreRequestor_Seq) as count FROM ROI_RequestCoreRequestor r WHERE r.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :id
hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT r.id FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.requestor.model.Requestor r WHERE r.lastName = ?0
SELECT r.id FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.requestor.model.Requestor r WHERE r.lastName = :lName and r.firstName = :fName
SELECT summaryLetter.createdDate, summaryLetter.requestTemplateId FROM com.mckesson.eig.roi.billing.model.RequestorLetter AS summaryLetter WHERE summaryLetter.requestorLetterId = ?0
hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
SELECT TOP 1000 * from (SELECT invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, 'Invoice-'+CAST(invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as description, 'Invoice' invoiceType,
case(select TOP 1 Base_Charge from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND Type = 'Prebill' order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq desc) when null then (SELECT TOP 1 Base_Charge FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND Type = 'Invoice' order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq desc) else (SELECT TOP 1 Base_Charge FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND Type = 'Prebill' order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq desc) end AS charge,
invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due as balance, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) adjustmentAmount, 0 refundAmount, null paymentDescription, null paymentMethod, CAST((SELECT STUFF((SELECT '~@~' + RTRIM(LTRIM(invoiceFacility.FACILITY)) FROM ((SELECT DISTINCT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq)
UNION ALL (SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq )) as invoiceFacility FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 3, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) facilityString, invoice.FACILITY_CODE billingLocation, invoice.Created_Dt createdDt, invoice.Created_By_Seq createdBy, invoice.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, invoice.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, invoice.Record_Version recordVersion, invoice.Unbillable_Amount unBillableAmount, case(select invoice.Unbillable from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) when 0 then 'NO' else 'YES'end AS unbillable FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq in (select distinct ROI_RequestCore_Seq from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) and Type = 'Invoice') as tmp
UNION ( SELECT adj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq id, 0 requestId, adj.Note as description, 'Unapplied Adjustment' invoiceType, 0.00 charge, adj.UnappliedAmount as balance, 0.00 paymentAmount, adj.UnappliedAmount as adjustmentAmount, 0 refundAmount, null paymentDescription, null paymentMethod, null facilityString, null billingLocation, adj.Created_Dt createdDt, adj.Created_By_Seq createdBy, adj.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, adj.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, adj.Record_Version recordVersion, 0.00 unBillableAmount, null unbillable FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment adj WHERE adj.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId and adj.UnappliedAmount is not null and adj.UnappliedAmount > 0 and adj.IsDeleted = 0)
UNION ( SELECT pay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq id, 0 requestId, pay.Description as description, 'Unapplied Payment' invoiceType, 0.00 charge, pay.UnappliedAmount as balance, pay.Amount paymentAmount, 0.00 as adjustmentAmount, pay.RefundAmount refundAmount, pay.Description paymentDescription, pay.PaymentType paymentMethod, null facilityString, null billingLocation, pay.Created_Dt createdDt, pay.Created_By_Seq createdBy, pay.PaymentDate modifiedDt, pay.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, pay.Record_Version recordVersion, 0.00 unBillableAmount, null unbillable FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment pay WHERE pay.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId and pay.UnappliedAmount is not null and pay.UnappliedAmount > 0 and pay.IsDeleted = 0) UNION ( SELECT refund.ROI_RequestorRefund_Seq id, 0 requestId, refund.Note as description, 'Refund' invoiceType, 0.00 charge, refund.Amount as balance, refund.Amount paymentAmount, 0.00 as adjustmentAmount, refund.Amount refundAmount, refund.Note paymentDescription, null paymentMethod, null facilityString, null billingLocation, refund.Created_Dt createdDt, refund.Created_By_Seq createdBy, refund.Date modifiedDt, refund.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, refund.Record_Version recordVersion, 0.00 unBillableAmount, null unbillable FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorRefund refund WHERE refund.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) UNION
SELECT TOP 1000 * from (SELECT TOP 1 invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, 'Prebill-'+CAST(invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as description, 'Prebill' invoiceType, invoice.Base_Charge charge, invoice.Balance_Due as balance, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) adjustmentAmount, 0 refundAmount, null paymentDescription, null paymentMethod, CAST((SELECT STUFF((SELECT '~@~' + RTRIM(LTRIM(invoiceFacility.FACILITY)) FROM ((SELECT DISTINCT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq)
UNION ALL (SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq )) as invoiceFacility FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 3, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) facilityString, invoice.FACILITY_CODE billingLocation, invoice.Created_Dt createdDt, invoice.Created_By_Seq createdBy, invoice.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, invoice.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, invoice.Record_Version recordVersion, invoice.Unbillable_Amount unBillableAmount, case(select invoice.Unbillable from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) when 0 then 'NO' else 'YES'end AS unbillable FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, cabinet..ROI_RequestCore requestCore WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq in (select distinct ROI_RequestCore_Seq from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) and invoice.Type = 'Prebill' and Balance_Due >= 0 and invoice.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and requestCore.RequestStatus <> 'Completed' order by ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq desc) as tmp ORDER BY modifiedDt desc, id desc

SELECT TOP 1000 * from (SELECT invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, 'Prebill-'+CAST(invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as description, 'Prebill' invoiceType, invoice.Base_Charge charge, invoice.Balance_Due as balance, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) adjustmentAmount, 0 refundAmount, null paymentDescription, null paymentMethod, CAST((SELECT STUFF((SELECT '~@~' + RTRIM(LTRIM(invoiceFacility.FACILITY)) FROM ((SELECT DISTINCT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq)
UNION ALL (SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq )) as invoiceFacility FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 3, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) facilityString, invoice.FACILITY_CODE billingLocation, invoice.Created_Dt createdDt, invoice.Created_By_Seq createdBy, invoice.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, invoice.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, invoice.Record_Version recordVersion, invoice.Unbillable_Amount unBillableAmount, case(select invoice.Unbillable from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) when 0 then 'NO' else 'YES'end AS unbillable FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, cabinet..ROI_RequestCore requestCore WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestCoreId and invoice.Type = 'Prebill' and Balance_Due >= 0 and invoice.Prebill_Status = 'Active' and invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestCore.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and requestCore.RequestStatus <> 'Completed') as tmp ORDER BY modifiedDt desc, id desc

SELECT rcdAdj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq id, SUM(rcdAdj.Amount) appliedAmount, 'Adjustment' txnType, adj.AdjustmentDate date, adj.UnappliedAmount unAppliedAmt, adj.Amount paymentAmount, 0 refundAmount, adj.Note description, adj.AdjustmentType paymentMethod, adj.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, rcdAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment rcdAdj, cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment adj WHERE rcdAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :invoiceIds ) AND rcdAdj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = adj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq AND rcdAdj.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY rcdAdj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq, rcdAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, adj.ROI_Requestor_Seq, adj.AdjustmentDate, adj.UnappliedAmount, adj.Amount, adj.Note, adj.AdjustmentType UNION (SELECT rcdPay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq id, SUM(rcdPay.Amount) appliedAmount, 'Payment' txnType, pay.PaymentDate date, pay.UnappliedAmount unAppliedAmt, pay.Amount paymentAmount, pay.RefundAmount refundAmount, pay.Description description, pay.PaymentType paymentMethod, pay.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, rcdPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment rcdPay, cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment pay WHERE rcdPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in ( :invoiceIds ) AND rcdPay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = pay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq AND rcdPay.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY rcdPay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq, rcdPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, pay.ROI_Requestor_Seq, pay.PaymentDate,pay.UnappliedAmount,pay.Amount,pay.RefundAmount, pay.Description,pay.PaymentType)

SELECT ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, rdc.Type + ' ' + CAST(ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as description, rdc.Type invoiceType, Base_Charge charge, Invoice_Balance_Due as balance, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, ISNULL((SELECT SUM(Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId and IsDeleted = '0'),'0.0') as appliedAmount, 0 as refundAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) adjustmentAmount, null paymentDescription, null paymentMethod, CAST((SELECT STUFF((SELECT '~@~' + RTRIM(LTRIM(invoiceFacility.FACILITY)) FROM ((SELECT DISTINCT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq)
UNION ALL (SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq )) as invoiceFacility FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 3, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) facilityString, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion, FACILITY_CODE billingLocation FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rdc WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq in (select distinct ROI_RequestCore_Seq from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) and rdc.Type = 'Invoice'
UNION
SELECT TOP 1 ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, ROI_RequestCore_Seq requestId, rdc.Type + ' ' + CAST(ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as varchar) as description, rdc.Type invoiceType, Base_Charge charge, Balance_Due as balance, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay WHERE reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and reqPay.IsDeleted = 0), 0) paymentAmount, ISNULL((SELECT SUM(Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId and IsDeleted = '0'),'0.0') as appliedAmount, 0 as refundAmount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj WHERE reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq and reqAdj.IsDeleted = 0), 0) adjustmentAmount, null paymentDescription, null paymentMethod, CAST((SELECT STUFF((SELECT '~@~' + RTRIM(LTRIM(invoiceFacility.FACILITY)) FROM ((SELECT DISTINCT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM cabinet..ROI_Patients pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_Patients_Seq = pat.ROI_Patients_Seq AND core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq)
UNION ALL (SELECT pat.FACILITY FACILITY FROM ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore pat, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesInvoicePatients core WHERE core.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND pat.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq = core.ROI_SupplementalPatientsCore_Seq )) as invoiceFacility FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 3, '')) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) facilityString, Created_Dt createdDt, Created_By_Seq createdBy, Modified_Dt modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, Record_Version recordVersion, FACILITY_CODE billingLocation FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rdc WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq in (select distinct ROI_RequestCore_Seq from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) and rdc.Type = 'Prebill' and rdc.Prebill_status = 'Active'

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment ( ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq, SalesTaxReduction, Amount, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version, IsPrebillAdjustment ) VALUES (:reqDelChargesSeq, :requestorAdjSeq, (SELECT (CASE when rdc.Apply_SalesTax = 1 then (((rdc.Invoice_Salestax)/(rdc.Base_Charge)) * (:amount)) else 0.00 end) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rdc WHERE rdc.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :reqDelChargesSeq), :amount, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy, :recordVersion, :prebillAdjustment) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment ( ROI_Requestor_Seq, Reason, Amount, UnappliedAmount, AdjustmentDate, AdjustmentType, Note, IsDeleted, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version) VALUES (:requestorSeq,:reason, :amount, :unappliedAmount, :adjustmentDate, :adjustmentType, :note, :isDeleted, :createdDate,:createdBy,:modifiedDate,:modifiedBy,:recordVersion) ; SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment( ROI_Requestor_Seq, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version, Amount, PaymentType, PaymentDate, Description, UnappliedAmount ) VALUES (:requestorSeq, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy, :recordVersion, :amount, :paymentMode, :paymentDate, :description, :unappliedAmount); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment SET Modified_Dt = :modifiedDate, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy, UnappliedAmount = :unappliedAmount WHERE ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = :requestorPaymentId

SELECT paymentId,requestCoreDeliveryChargesId,SUM(appliedAmount) as totalAppliedAmount, prebillPayment FROM ( SELECT ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq as requestCoreDeliveryChargesId, ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq as paymentId, Amount as appliedAmount, IsPrebillPayment as prebillPayment FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment invoiceToPay WHERE ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = (:paymentId) AND IsDeleted = 0) invoiceToPayment group by requestCoreDeliveryChargesId,paymentId,prebillPayment
SELECT ROI_RequestorType_Seq FROM ROI_Requestor where ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId

SELECT adj.Reason reason, adj.Amount amount, adj.UnappliedAmount unappliedAmount, adj.AdjustmentDate adjustmentDate, adj.AdjustmentType adjustmentTypeByValue, adj.Note note FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment adj WHERE adj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq =:reqAdjId
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment SET UnappliedAmount = :unappliedAmount, Modified_Dt = :modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy WHERE ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment SET IsDeleted = 1 WHERE ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId AND ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId

UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment SET Amount = :amount, Modified_Dt = :modifiedDt, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy WHERE ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId

SELECT rcdAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, COALESCE(SUM(rcdAdj.Amount), 0) appliedAmount FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment rcdAdj WHERE rcdAdj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq

SELECT invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceId, invoice.Created_Dt createdDate, invoice.Balance_Due amount FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestRequestor WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestRequestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' AND requestRequestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId ORDER BY invoice.Created_Dt desc;

SELECT requestorTransaction.date date, requestorTransaction.invoiceId invoiceId, CAST(requestorTransaction.type AS varchar) type, CAST(requestorTransaction.description AS varchar) description, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.charges, 0) charges, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.balances, 0) balances, -- DE1560/CR# 384,396 - Fix COALESCE(requestorTransaction.unbillable, 0) unbillable, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.adjustment, 0) adjustment, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.payment, 0) payment, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.invoiceAmount, 0) invoiceAmount, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.refund, 0) refund
FROM( SELECT invoice.Created_Dt date, invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceId, 'Invoice' type, 'invoice # ' + CAST(invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AS varchar) description, invoice.Base_Charge charges, invoice.Balance_Due balances, invoice.Unbillable unbillable, 0 adjustment, 0 payment, invoice.Base_Charge invoiceAmount, 0 refund FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' AND requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId
UNION
SELECT payment.Created_Dt date, 0 invoiceId, 'Payment' type, payment.Description description, payment.Amount charges, 0 balances, 0 unbillable, 0 adjustment, payment.Amount payment, 0 invoiceAmount, 0 refund FROM ROI_RequestorPayment payment WHERE payment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId and payment.IsDeleted <> '1'
UNION
SELECT adjustment.Created_Dt date, 0 invoiceId, 'Adjustment' type, adjustment.Note description, COALESCE(adjustment.Amount, 0) charges, 0 balances, 0 unbillable, COALESCE(adjustment.Amount, 0) adjustment, 0 payment, 0 invoiceAmount, 0 refund FROM ROI_RequestorAdjustment adjustment WHERE adjustment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId and adjustment.IsDeleted <> '1'
UNION
SELECT refund.Created_Dt date, 0 invoiceId, 'Refund' type, refund.Note description, (COALESCE(refund.Amount, 0)) charges, 0 balances, 0 unbillable, (COALESCE(refund.Amount, 0)) adjustment, 0 payment, 0 invoiceAmount, (COALESCE(refund.Amount, 0)) refund FROM ROI_RequestorRefund refund WHERE refund.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId ) as requestorTransaction WHERE DATEDIFF(day, requestorTransaction.date, getDate()) <= :dateRange ORDER BY requestorTransaction.date

SELECT requestorTransaction.date date, requestorTransaction.invoiceId invoiceId, CAST(requestorTransaction.type AS varchar) type, CAST(requestorTransaction.description AS varchar) description, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.charges, 0) charges, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.balances, 0) balances, -- DE1560/CR# 384,396 - Fix COALESCE(requestorTransaction.unbillable, 0) unbillable, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.adjustment, 0) adjustment, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.payment, 0) payment, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.invoiceAmount, 0) invoiceAmount, COALESCE(requestorTransaction.refund, 0) refund FROM( SELECT invoice.Created_Dt date, invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq invoiceId, 'Invoice' type, 'invoice # ' + CAST(invoice.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AS varchar) description, invoice.Base_Charge charges, invoice.Balance_Due balances, invoice.Unbillable unbillable, 0 adjustment, 0 payment, invoice.Base_Charge invoiceAmount, 0 refund FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' AND requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId
UNION
SELECT payment.Created_Dt date, 0 invoiceId, 'Payment' type, payment.Description description, payment.Amount charges, 0 balances, 0 unbillable, 0 adjustment, payment.Amount payment, 0 invoiceAmount, 0 refund FROM ROI_RequestorPayment payment WHERE payment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId and payment.IsDeleted <> '1' UNION
SELECT adjustment.Created_Dt date, 0 invoiceId, 'Adjustment' type, adjustment.Note description, COALESCE(adjustment.Amount, 0) charges, 0 balances, 0 unbillable, COALESCE(adjustment.Amount, 0) adjustment, 0 payment, 0 invoiceAmount, 0 refund FROM ROI_RequestorAdjustment adjustment WHERE adjustment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId and adjustment.IsDeleted <> '1'
UNION
SELECT refund.Created_Dt date, 0 invoiceId, 'Refund' type, refund.Note description, (COALESCE(refund.Amount, 0)) charges, 0 balances, 0 unbillable, 0 adjustment, 0 payment, 0 invoiceAmount, (COALESCE(refund.Amount, 0)) refund FROM ROI_RequestorRefund refund WHERE refund.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId ) as requestorTransaction ORDER BY requestorTransaction.date

SELECT CAST(COALESCE(SUM(charge), 0) as float) charges, aging FROM (SELECT invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due charge, aging = case when datediff (day, invoice.Created_Dt, getDate()) between 0 and 30 then 'Balance30' when datediff (day, invoice.Created_Dt, getDate()) between 31 and 60 then 'Balance60' when datediff (day, invoice.Created_Dt, getDate()) between 61 and 90 then 'Balance90' else 'BalanceOther' END FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' AND invoice.UnBillable = 0 AND invoice.Invoice_Balance_due > 0 AND requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) accountBalanceAging GROUP BY aging

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(invoice.Base_Charge), 0) charge,
COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqPay.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorPayment reqPay, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestRequestor WHERE requestRequestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND requestRequestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND reqPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = inv.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqPay.IsDeleted <> '1'), 0) paymentAmount,
COALESCE((SELECT SUM(reqAdj.Amount) FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesToROI_RequestorAdjustment reqAdj, ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestRequestor WHERE requestRequestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND requestRequestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND reqAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = inv.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq AND reqAdj.IsDeleted <> '1'), 0) creditAdjustmentAmount,
0.00 debitAdjustmentAmount, COALESCE(SUM(invoice.Invoice_Balance_Due), 0) balances, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(payment.UnappliedAmount) FROM ROI_RequestorPayment payment WHERE payment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND payment.IsDeleted <> '1'), 0) unAppliedPayment, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(adjustment.UnappliedAmount) FROM ROI_RequestorAdjustment adjustment WHERE adjustment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND adjustment.IsDeleted <> '1'), 0) unAppliedAdjustment FROM ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges invoice, ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor WHERE invoice.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq AND invoice.Type = 'Invoice' AND invoice.UnBillable = 0 AND requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId GROUP BY requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq

SELECT requestorDetail.ROI_Requestor_Seq id, requestorDetail.Name name, requestorDetail.Type requestorTypeName, requestorDetail.requestorTypeId requestorTypeId, requestorDetail.cellPhone cellPhone, requestorDetail.homePhone homePhone, requestorDetail.workPhone workPhone, requestorAddress.AddressLine1 address1, requestorAddress.AddressLine2 address2, requestorAddress.AddressLine3 address3, requestorAddress.City city, requestorAddress.State state, requestorAddress.PostalCode postalCode, requestorAddress.Country_Name country, requestorAddress.Country_Code countryCode FROM
(SELECT requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq, requestor.NameLast Name, requestorType.Name type, requestorType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq requestorTypeId, (SELECT CAST(emailPhone.EmailPhone AS VARCHAR(512)) FROM ROI_RequestorToEmailPhone requestorEmailPhone, ROI_EmailPhoneType type, ROI_EmailPhone emailPhone WHERE requestorEmailPhone.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND requestorEmailPhone.ROI_EmailPhoneType_Seq = type.ROI_EmailPhoneType_Seq AND type.Name = 'Cell' AND emailPhone.ROI_EmailPhone_Seq = requestorEmailPhone.ROI_EmailPhone_Seq) cellPhone,
(SELECT CAST(emailPhone.EmailPhone AS VARCHAR(512)) FROM ROI_RequestorToEmailPhone requestorEmailPhone, ROI_EmailPhoneType type, ROI_EmailPhone emailPhone WHERE requestorEmailPhone.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND requestorEmailPhone.ROI_EmailPhoneType_Seq = type.ROI_EmailPhoneType_Seq AND type.Name = 'Home' AND emailPhone.ROI_EmailPhone_Seq = requestorEmailPhone.ROI_EmailPhone_Seq) homePhone,
(SELECT CAST(emailPhone.EmailPhone AS VARCHAR(512)) FROM ROI_RequestorToEmailPhone requestorEmailPhone, ROI_EmailPhoneType type, ROI_EmailPhone emailPhone WHERE requestorEmailPhone.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq AND requestorEmailPhone.ROI_EmailPhoneType_Seq = type.ROI_EmailPhoneType_Seq AND type.Name = 'Work' AND emailPhone.ROI_EmailPhone_Seq = requestorEmailPhone.ROI_EmailPhone_Seq) workPhone
FROM ROI_Requestor requestor, ROI_RequestorType requestorType
WHERE requestor.ROI_RequestorType_Seq = requestorType.ROI_RequestorType_Seq AND requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) as requestorDetail
Left JOIN
(SELECT requestorAdd.ROI_Requestor_Seq, address.AddressLine1, address.AddressLine2, address.AddressLine3, address.City, address.State, address.PostalCode, countryCode.Country_Name, countryCode.Country_Code FROM ROI_RequestorToAddress requestorAdd, ROI_Address address, ROI_AddressType addressType, ROI_CountryLov countryCode WHERE requestorAdd.ROI_Address_Seq = address.ROI_Address_Seq AND requestorAdd.ROI_AddressType_Seq = addressType.ROI_AddressType_Seq AND addressType.Name = 'Main' AND countryCode.ROI_CountryLovID = address.ROI_CountryLovID AND requestorAdd.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) as requestorAddress ON requestorDetail.ROI_Requestor_Seq = requestorAddress.ROI_Requestor_Seq

SELECT ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq id, Type type, Invoice_Due_Date invoiceDueDate, Queue_Password queuePassword, Balance_Due balance, Invoice_Balance_Due invoiceBalance, (select NAME from cabinet..USERS where UserInstanceId = rdc.created_By_Seq) creatorName, Created_Dt createdDate, Prebill_Status prebillStatus, Letter_Template_Name template, (SELECT CASE WHEN rdc.Invoice_Balance_Due != 0 THEN 'Open' ELSE 'Closed' END) as status, (select ReqPassword from ROI_RequestCore where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq) requestPassword, DATEDIFF(d,rdc.Created_Dt,GETDATE()) as aging, rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, 0 migrated
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges rdc WHERE rdc.ROI_RequestCore_Seq in (select distinct ROI_RequestCore_Seq from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId)
UNION
SELECT ROI_StatementLetterCore_Seq id, 'Statement' type, null invoiceDueDate, null queuePassword, 0.0 balance, 0.0 invoiceBalance, (select NAME from cabinet..USERS where UserInstanceId = rlc.created_By_Seq) creatorName, Created_Dt createdDate, null prebillStatus, TemplateName template, null status, null requestPassword, null aging, 0 requestId, 0 migrated
FROM cabinet..ROI_StatementLetterCore rlc WHERE rlc.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId
UNION
select ROI_RequestDeliveryCharges_Seq, 'Invoice' as type, null as invoiceDueDate, Queue_Password as queuePassword, Balance_Due as balance, Balance_Due as invoiceBalance, (select name from cabinet.dbo.USERS where UserInstanceId = Created_By_Seq) as creatorName, Created_Dt as createdDate, null as prebillStatus, 'Invoice' as template, (SELECT CASE WHEN Balance_Due != 0 THEN 'Open' ELSE 'Closed' END) as status, Request_Password as requestPassword, 0 as aging, ROI_RequestCore_Seq as requestId, 1 as migrated from ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargesMigrated WHERE ROI_RequestCore_Seq in (select distinct ROI_RequestCore_Seq from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId )

SELECT
'Unapplied Adjustment' type, COALESCE(SUM(adj.UnappliedAmount),0.0) amount
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment adj WHERE adj.ROI_Requestor_Seq = (SELECT ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) and adj.UnappliedAmount is not null and adj.UnappliedAmount > 0 and adj.IsDeleted = 0
UNION
SELECT
'Unapplied Payment' type, COALESCE(SUM(pay.UnappliedAmount),0.0) amount
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment pay WHERE pay.ROI_Requestor_Seq = (SELECT ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) and pay.UnappliedAmount is not null and pay.UnappliedAmount > 0 and pay.IsDeleted = 0

SELECT ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq id, Amount paymentAmount, PaymentType paymentMethod, PaymentDate date, Description description, UnappliedAmount unAppliedAmt, 0 invoiceId, null txnType, 0 appliedAmount, ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment pay WHERE pay.ROI_Requestor_Seq = (SELECT ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) and pay.UnappliedAmount is not null and pay.UnappliedAmount > 0 and pay.IsDeleted = 0

SELECT ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq invoiceSeq, ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorSeq, Reason reason, Amount amount, UnappliedAmount unappliedAmount, AdjustmentDate adjustmentDate, adj.AdjustmentType adjustmentTypeByValue, Note note
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment adj WHERE adj.ROI_Requestor_Seq = (SELECT ROI_Requestor_Seq FROM ROI_RequestCoreRequestor where ROI_RequestCore_Seq = :requestId) and adj.UnappliedAmount is not null and adj.UnappliedAmount > 0 and adj.IsDeleted = 0
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment SET Modified_Dt = :modifiedDate, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy, UnappliedAmount = :unappliedAmount WHERE ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = :requestorPaymentId
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment SET Modified_Dt = :modifiedDate, Modified_By_Seq = :modifiedBy, UnappliedAmount = :unappliedAmount WHERE ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :requestorAdjustmentId

if exists (select 1 from cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges where ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = ? and type = 'Invoice') UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges SET Invoice_Balance_Due = ?, Modified_Dt = ?, Modified_By_Seq = ? WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = ? ELSE UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges SET Balance_Due = ?, Modified_Dt = ?, Modified_By_Seq = ? WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = ?

SELECT coalesce((SELECT SUM(inv.Invoice_Balance_Due) FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges inv, cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreRequestor requestor where inv.ROI_RequestCore_Seq = requestor.ROI_RequestCore_Seq and requestor.ROI_Requestor_Seq = req.ROI_Requestor_Seq) ,0) invoiceBalance,
coalesce((SELECT SUM(payment.UnappliedAmount) FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment payment WHERE payment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = req.ROI_Requestor_Seq and payment.IsDeleted = 0),0) unAppliedPayment,
coalesce((SELECT SUM(adjustment.UnappliedAmount) FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment adjustment WHERE adjustment.ROI_Requestor_Seq = req.ROI_Requestor_Seq and adjustment.IsDeleted = 0),0) unAppliedAdjustment
FROM cabinet..ROI_Requestor req WHERE req.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId GROUP by req.ROI_Requestor_Seq
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment SET Modified_Dt = ?, Modified_By_Seq = ?, UnappliedAmount = ? WHERE ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = ?
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment SET RefundAmount = ?, Modified_Dt = ?, Modified_By_Seq = ?, UnappliedAmount = ? WHERE ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = ?
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment SET UnappliedAmount = ?0, Modified_Dt = ?1, Modified_By_Seq = ?2 WHERE ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = ?3

INSERT into cabinet..ROI_RequestorRefund( ROI_Requestor_Seq, Amount, Date, Note, TemplateId, TemplateName, OutputMethod, QueuePassword, FREEFORM_NOTE, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version)
VALUES(:requestorId, :refundAmount, :refundDate, :note, :templateId, :templateName, :outputMethod, :queuePassword, :freeformnote, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy, :recordVersion); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();

SELECT refund.ROI_RequestorRefund_Seq id, refund.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, refund.Amount refundAmount, refund.Date refundDate, case when refund.Freeform_note is not null then refund.Freeform_note else refund.Note end note, refund.TemplateId templateFileId, refund.TemplateName templateName, refund.OutputMethod outputMethod, refund.QueuePassword queuePassword, refund.Created_Dt createdDt, refund.Created_By_Seq createdBy, refund.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, refund.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, refund.Record_Version recordVersion, (Select u.FullName from USERS u where u.UserInstanceId = refund.Created_By_Seq) userName
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorRefund refund Where refund.ROI_RequestorRefund_Seq = :refundId

SELECT pay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq paymentId, pay.Amount totalAppliedAmount, pay.UnappliedAmount unAppliedAmount, COALESCE(pay.RefundAmount, 0) refundAmount FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment pay WHERE pay.UnappliedAmount > 0 AND pay.ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId AND pay.IsDeleted = 0

SELECT rcdAdj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq id, adj.Amount amount, CASE WHEN (adj.amount = rcdAdj.Amount) and (adj.UnappliedAmount = 0.00) and rcdAdj.IsPrebillAdjustment = 0 then rcdAdj.Amount else (adj.Amount - rcdAdj.Amount) END unAppliedAmt, rcdAdj.Amount appliedAmount, 'Adjustment' txnType, rcdAdj.IsPrebillAdjustment prebillPaymentsAdjustments
FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment rcdAdj, cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment adj WHERE rcdAdj.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (:invoiceId) AND rcdAdj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = adj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq AND rcdAdj.IsDeleted = 0 UNION (SELECT rcdPay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq id, pay.Amount amount, CASE WHEN (pay.amount = rcdPay.Amount) and (pay.UnappliedAmount = 0.00) and rcdPay.IsPrebillPayment = 0 then pay.Amount else (pay.Amount - rcdPay.Amount) END unAppliedAmt, rcdPay.Amount appliedAmount, 'Payment' txnType, rcdPay.IsPrebillPayment prebillPaymentsAdjustments FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment rcdPay, cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment pay WHERE rcdPay.ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq in (:invoiceId) AND rcdPay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = pay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq AND rcdPay.IsDeleted = 0)

SELECT pay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq paymentId, pay.ROI_Requestor_Seq requestorId, pay.Created_Dt createdDt, pay.Created_By_Seq createdBy, pay.Modified_Dt modifiedDt, pay.Modified_By_Seq modifiedBy, pay.Record_Version recordVersion, pay.Amount paymentAmount, pay.PaymentType paymentMode, pay.Description description, pay.UnappliedAmount unAppliedAmount, pay.PaymentDate paymentDate FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorPayment pay WHERE pay.ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = :paymentId AND pay.IsDeleted = 0

SELECT adj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq id, adj.Amount amount, adj.Reason reason, adj.UnappliedAmount unappliedAmount, adj.AdjustmentDate adjustmentDate, adj.AdjustmentType adjustmentTypeByValue, adj.Note note FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestorAdjustment adj WHERE adj.ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId AND adj.IsDeleted = 0
UPDATE ROI_RequestorPayment SET isDeleted ='1' WHERE ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = :paymentId
UPDATE ROI_RequestorAdjustment SET isDeleted ='1' WHERE ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId

SELECT ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq mappingId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorAdjustment WHERE ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq = :adjustmentId AND ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId AND IsDeleted = 0

SELECT ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment_seq mappingId FROM cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment WHERE ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = :paymentId AND ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId AND IsDeleted = 0

INSERT INTO cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment( ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq, ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq, Created_Dt, Created_By_Seq, Modified_Dt, Modified_By_Seq, Record_Version, Amount, IsPrebillPayment ) VALUES (:invoiceId, :paymentId, :createdDate, :createdBy, :modifiedDate, :modifiedBy, :recordVersion, :amount, :prebillPayment); SELECT SCOPE_IDENTITY();
UPDATE cabinet..ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryChargestoROI_RequestorPayment SET IsDeleted = 1 WHERE ROI_RequestCoreDeliveryCharges_Seq = :invoiceId and ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq = :paymentId

SELECT ((SELECT COUNT(ROI_RequestorAdjustment_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestorAdjustment WHERE ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId) + (SELECT COUNT(ROI_RequestorPayment_Seq) FROM ROI_RequestorPayment WHERE ROI_Requestor_Seq = :requestorId)) adjPaymentCount
